title: Deep learning for genomics using Janggu.
author: Kopp W Monti R Tamburrini A Ohler U Akalin A
content: S-EPMC7359359 PMC7359359 Deep learning for genomics using Janggu. In recent years, numerous applications have demonstrated the potential of deep learning for an improved understanding of biological processes.
